info.name: Rashemi Wanderer
info.description: The Rashemi Wanderer background from Forgotten Realms: Heroes of Faerûn.
info.author: Wizards of the Coast

ul.li: Equipment: Choose A or B: (A) Cartographer’s Tools, Backpack, Bedroll, Hooded Lantern, Oil (3 flasks), Rope, Tinderbox, Traveler’s Clothes, Waterskin, 23 GP; or (B) 50 GP

description.p: You spent years wandering the highlands of Rashemen, a dangerous windswept heath that’s dotted with ancient obelisks enchanted to imprison Fiends and home to dragons, gnolls, and other deadly creatures. Friendships are hard to find in such an isolated land, and you’ve learned to keep strangers at a distance.

setters.set: Strength, Constitution, Charisma, Tough Feat, Intimidation and Perception Skills, and Cartographer’s Tools
